settings.title: Meet the Crew Behind the Greenfield Vans
settings.excerpt: The four people who turn up at your gate each have a corner of the trade they care about most.
settings.body:
People often ask who actually does the work once a design is signed off. Here is the Greenfield crew.

Marek runs the builds and can set a drystone edge faster than the rest of us can mix mortar. Priya handles planting plans and keeps a notebook of every soil type we have met on the round.

Tom is our machinery hand and the calmest person to have nearby when a stump will not budge. Aoife joined us last spring straight from college and already spots a pest problem before any of us do.

When you book Greenfield, you get the same faces each visit. We think that matters more than a glossy brochure.
